project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET 可执行文件.Editor.executor": "Run", ".NET 可执行文件.Player.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.sourceCode.C#", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

option.name: json
json
